title: monechma ndellense
intro: Monechma ndellense, also known as the African or wild basil, is a shrub native to tropical Africa and is a member of the Acanthaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been known to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Monechma ndellense can be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although its usage and safety should be verified by a healthcare professional.
